summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Fluid Properties and Pressure is a key topic in Fluid Mechanics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of fluid properties and pressure.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding fluid properties and pressure has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
